{{Dialogue|Skywalker|Hey Finn. Gimme a Corellian.|Finn|Ale or whiskey?|Skywalker|Both. Fofo.|Jool|They're on the house, Finn, dear.|attr=Cade Skywalker, Finn, and Jool discuss the bounty hunter's drinks|src=<ref name="Legacy 14" />}}
'''Finn''' was a [[Sakiyan/Legends|Sakiyan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as a bartender for [[Rik's Cantina/Legends|Rik's Cantina]] in the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|underworld]] during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]. He also served as the main bouncer of Rik's, which was owned by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Jool]]. In [[137 ABY]], he served [[Alcohol/Legends|drinks]] to the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Cade Skywalker]], who was visiting Jool.

==Biography==
[[File:Tendingthebar.jpg|thumb|left|145px|Finn mixes drinks at Rik's Cantina.]]
Finn, a [[Sakiyan/Legends|Sakiyan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]],<ref name="CSWE" /> was born in the [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] leading up to the [[Sith–Imperial War]]. He eventually became the lead bartender and main enforcer of [[Rik's Cantina/Legends|Rik's Cantina]], a [[Cantina/Legends|bar]] in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|underworld]] of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] operated by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Jool]].<ref name="Legacy 0½">[[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0½|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0½]]</ref> He defended Rik's Cantina from troublemakers using subtle and efficient methods, such as placing tranquilizers in a [[Alcohol/Legends|drink]] and offering it to a disruptive patron.<ref name="LE CG" /> During this period, he became familiar with the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Cade Skywalker]], who frequented the cantina with his friends [[Jariah Syn]] and [[Deliah Blue]].<ref name="Legacy 14" />

In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[137 ABY]], during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]],<ref name="LE CG" /> Finn was working in Rik's Cantina when Skywalker came to the bar in order to visit Jool. Skywalker asked the Sakiyan to pour him both a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Corellian whiskey/Legends|whiskey]] and an [[Corellian ale/Legends|ale]], and Finn was informed by the Hutt that the cantina would cover the cost of the drinks. Finn gave the drinks to Skywalker and continued managing the bar as Skywalker and Jool conversed with each other.<ref name="Legacy 14" />

==Personality and traits==
The Sakiyan male<ref name="LE CG" /> Finn was a jaded<ref name="Legacy 0">[[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0]]</ref> and distant individual, and was unsurprised by any actions performed in Rik's Cantina. However, his demeanor belied his abilities both in [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed combat]] and with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. When in a difficult situation, Finn remained calm and would maintain his composure. Finn owned a heavy [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], and tranquilizer drops that he placed in unruly patrons' drinks.<ref name="LE CG" /> He did not question Queen Jool when she told him that the cantina would cover the cost of Cade Skywalker's drinks. Finn's [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] were [[Color/Legends|black]] and his skin was gray.<ref name="Legacy 14" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Finn.jpg|thumb|150px|A sketch of Finn]]
Finn was first featured in [[2006]]'s [[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0]], a resource comic that gave basic information on some of the characters, locations, and organizations of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series, written by [[John Ostrander]].<ref name="Legacy 0" /> Finn's sole appearance was in the [[Legacy (2006) 14|fourteenth issue]] of ''Legacy'', in which he was drawn by [[Jan Duursema]].<ref name="Legacy 14" />
